mapper.insert: insert into kh_spider_job_items (id, resource_type, name, source_url, site_url, source_sitetag, language, status, spider_time, spider_end_time, hash_article, create_time, update_time, job_id, spider_log ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{resourceType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{siteUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceSitetag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{language,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{spiderTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{spiderEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{hashArticle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{jobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{spiderLog,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: update kh_spider_job_items set resource_type = #{resourceType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, source_url = #{sourceUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, site_url = #{siteUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, source_sitetag = #{sourceSitetag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, language = #{language,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, spider_time = #{spiderTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, spider_end_time = #{spiderEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, hash_article = #{hashArticle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, job_id = #{jobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, spider_log = #{spiderLog,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id, resource_type, name, source_url, site_url, source_sitetag, language, status, spider_time, spider_end_time, hash_article, create_time, update_time, job_id, spider_log from kh_spider_job_items where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select id, resource_type, name, source_url, site_url, source_sitetag, language, status, spider_time, spider_end_time, hash_article, create_time, update_time, job_id, spider_log from kh_spider_job_items
